heading: Establishment of program
label: 12573 Establishment of program

CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14113 of Title 42

children.label: A
children.text: awarding scholarships to in-service law enforcement personnel to enable such personnel to seek further education; and

children.label: ii
children.text: part-time (not to exceed 20 hours per week) employment for a period not to exceed 1 year.

children.label: A
children.text: shall be provided by State and local law enforcement agencies for students who are juniors or seniors in high school or are enrolled in an institution of higher education and who demonstrate an interest in undertaking a career in law enforcement;

children.label: B
children.text: shall not be in a law enforcement position; and

children.label: C
children.text: shall consist of performing meaningful tasks that inform students of the nature of the tasks performed by law enforcement agencies.

children.heading: Payments; Federal share; non-Federal share
children.label: b Payments; Federal share; non-Federal share

children.heading: Payments
children.label: 1 Payments
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, the Director shall pay to each State that receives an allotment under the Federal share of the cost of the activities described in the application submitted pursuant to section 12576 of this title.section 12572 of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Federal share
children.label: 2 Federal share
children.text: The Federal share shall not exceed 60 percent.

children.heading: Non-Federal share
children.label: 3 Non-Federal share
children.text: The non-Federal share of the cost of scholarships and student employment provided under this part shall be supplied from sources other than the Federal Government.

children.heading: Responsibilities of Director
children.label: c Responsibilities of Director
children.text: The Director shall be responsible for the administration of the programs conducted pursuant to this part and shall, in consultation with the Assistant Secretary for Postsecondary Education, issue rules to implement this part.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: d Administrative expenses
children.text: A State that receives an allotment under may reserve not more than 8 percent of the allotment for administrative expenses.section 12572 of this title

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: e Special rule
children.text: A State that receives an allotment under shall ensure that each scholarship recipient under this part be compensated at the same rate of pay and benefits and enjoy the same rights under applicable agreements with labor organizations and under State and local law as other law enforcement personnel of the same rank and tenure in the office of which the scholarship recipient is a member.section 12572 of this title

children.heading: Supplementation of funding
children.label: f Supplementation of funding
children.text: Funds received under this part shall only be used to supplement, and not to supplant, Federal, State, or local efforts for recruitment and education of law enforcement personnel.
